query: SELECT id, company, employeeCount, source FROM jobs WHERE employeeCount > 100 OR LOWER(company) LIKE '%tata%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2cDb5Hf2U12UspD.root --database REzhPHfbXGKqcVNEDV6trD --execute SELECT id, company, employeeCount, source FROM jobs WHERE employeeCount > 100 OR LOWER(company) LIKE '%tata%';
